name: mnemo
description: Long-term memory layer for Claude Code sessions — persists context across sessions, learns from corrections, enforces lessons at tool-use time.

api_token.title: API token
api_token.description: Bearer token for Mnemo authentication (from your Mnemo server setup)

server_url.title: Mnemo server URL
server_url.description: Base URL of your Mnemo MCP server (e.g. http://localhost:3456 or http://192.168.1.10:3456)
